arts.sum: Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that VfL Wolfsburg managing director Peter Christiansen has eyes for another Danish international.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Wolfsburg: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: A look at the rosters and injuries for Wolfsburg and Bayern Munich . Bayern Munich maintain their lead at the top of the Bundesliga after a 5-0 thumping of Hoffenheim, but last season’s title winners Bayer Leverkusen is right on their heels.

arts.ttl: “I love playing for this club” says Eric Dier with Bayern contract expiring in 2025
arts.sum: Eric Dier made his third start for Bayern Munich this season in the Bundesliga. Regardless of the game time, Dier delivered back to back solid performances, first against Borussia Mönchengladbach and then against TSG Hoffenheim.

arts.ttl: Andreas Skov Olsen: Who is Wolfsburg's new Danish international winger?
arts.sum: Skov Olsen scored three goals for Bologna in Serie A. Skov Olsen has converted his skill more readily into goals and assists thus far in his career, and gained greater playing time for the Danish national team.

arts.ttl: Bayern München vs Wolfsburg preview: Second half of the season begins for league leaders
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany's table-topping Bayern München will welcome Champions League contenders Wolfsburg to the Allianz Arena on Saturday for an exciting Bundesliga clash.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich plan for Jonas Urbig to join a three way battle for the #2 goalkeeper role
arts.sum: At this point, there have been countless rumors about Bayern Munich ’s determination to sign Jonas Urbig, with the latest rumors suggesting the Bavarians have moved their plan to sign the FC Köln goalkeeper forward to January due to Daniel Peretz’s injury. Are Bayern Munich planning to finish the final months of the season with four senior goalkeepers?

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich had informal talks with Liverpool
arts.sum: According to a report from Tz journalists Philipp Kessler and Vinzent Tschirpke (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Liverpool FC wants to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich — and has already made contact via informal talks with the 29-year-old: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.
VfL Wolfsburg have announced the signing of Danish international Andreas Skov Olsen.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Package deal? Are Jamal Musiala and Alphonso Davies teaming up in talks with Bayern Munich?; Agent wants to make things difficult for Bayern after Uli Hoeneß slight per report; Checking out Sum 41; Bundesliga predictions; and MORE!
arts.sum: However, Davies’ agent (Nick Huoseh)— who has been a handful for Bayern Munich to deal with so far — trying to play his client’s offer off of Musiala is a bit of dirty pool given how different their respective positions are valued. Two of the most important contract situations at the moment for Bayern Munich involve Jamal Musiala and Alphonso Davies.
League leaders Bayern Munich will be taking on Wolfsburg on Saturday at the Allianz Arena for matchday 18 in the Bundesliga. Vincent Kompany’s side are four points clear at the…
